inputConfigurations.targetQuery: select atm_id as atm_id, au_num as au_num, site_city_nm as site_city_nm, site_st_cd as site_st_cd, site_pstl_cd as site_pstl_cd, eff_dt as eff_dt, expir_dt as expir_dt, atm_stat_nm as atm_stat_nm, 'RDMA' as CAP_SOR_CD, '' as CAP_DELTA_CD, %CAP_APP_ID% as CAP_CRTE_BY_ID, current_timestamp as CAP_CRTE_DTTM, 0 as CAP_ERR_FLG_IND, '' as CAP_ERR_TXT, %CAP_RUN_ID% as CAP_RUN_ID, %CAP_BUS_EFF_DT% as CAP_BUS_EFF_DT from %TEMP_DATABASE%.t_atm_loc_fnl
